description: A vertical graphic over a faint U.S. flag background. Blue italic text gives a quotation about the termination of the Biden-era CHNV and Temporary Protected Status programs and restoring integrity to the immigration system. Bold text at the bottom attributes the quote to USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser.
notable_text: termination of the Biden-era CHNV and Temporary Protected Status programs; restore integrity to our immigration system, make America safe again; USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser
